overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in tactical gear walking through a futuristic corporate plaza during golden hour. The character approaches and circles a large police mech, then ascends terraced stairs to an upper level overlooking the cityscape with reflective wet pavement and numerous digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCPD cordoned corporate plaza with digital billboards

events.description: character begins walking forward from the NCPD barrier checkpoint

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet plaza toward the center where a police mech is stationed

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the distance toward the building entrance

entered.detail: red illuminated police barricades with NCPD branding
large digital billboard showing political campaign advertisement
tall futuristic skyscraper with reflective glass facade
shiny tiled ground surface reflecting the golden hour sunlight

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic corporate plaza cordoned off with NCPD barriers. The character walks forward on wet reflective pavement toward a distant police mech, passing large digital billboards including a political campaign advertisement. The golden hour sunlight casts long shadows across the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: police mech checkpoint in corporate plaza

events.description: large police mech activates and shifts its stance as the character approaches
camera begins circling around the mech to view it from multiple angles

agents.ego_description: circling around the police mech to observe it from different angles while maintaining distance

notable_agents.action: large quadruped police mech standing guard with weapons mounted, occasionally shifting weight
NCPD officer standing watch near the mech

entered.detail: massive black quadruped robotic walker with mounted weapons and police markings
curved elevated roadway structure silhouetted against the sunset

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive police mech stationed in the plaza center. The mech activates as the character nears, shifting its heavy metallic frame. The camera circles around the mech, revealing the setting sun behind the elevated highway ramps and showcasing the machine's detailed mechanical structure against the warm golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate building entrance with terraced stairs

events.description: moving from open plaza into the sheltered area beneath the corporate building overhang
character begins ascending the terraced concrete stairs toward the building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up the terraced stairs on the left side of the plaza toward the corporate building entrance

notable_agents.action: security guard standing near the glass entrance doors

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with multiple levels leading up to building entrance
modern building facade with large glass doors and blue neon lighting
rectangular concrete planters with greenery arranged along the terrace

segments.scene_description: Leaving the mech behind, the character moves toward the left side of the plaza and begins ascending terraced concrete stairs. The environment becomes more sheltered under the building's overhang, with decorative planters lining the path. A security guard stands watch near the illuminated glass entrance doors as the character approaches the building.

events.description: emerging onto upper terrace level with panoramic view of the cityscape

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper terrace overlooking the plaza, taking in the panoramic city view

entered.detail: low concrete wall and railing marking the edge of the elevated walkway
expansive view of the downtown district with multiple skyscrapers and digital billboards
massive tiered skyscraper with illuminated signage and architectural lighting

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an upper terrace that provides a sweeping panoramic view of the Night City downtown district. From this elevated vantage point, the plaza below is visible along with numerous illuminated skyscrapers, digital advertising towers, and the elevated highway system. The warm sunset light bathes the entire cityscape in golden tones as the character walks along the terrace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cordoned-off corporate plaza that gradually ascends to a panoramic overlook of a futuristic cityscape. It begins on wet, reflective pavement under the glow of digital billboards, moving forward through the golden hour light toward a distant police mech. As the character nears the machine, the camera circles its shifting metallic frame to reveal the setting sun positioned behind elevated highway ramps. The scene then shifts away from the mech toward terraced concrete stairs, moving under a building's overhang past decorative planters and a stationed security guard. Finally, the camera emerges onto an upper terrace, opening up to a sweeping view of illuminated skyscrapers and advertising towers bathed in warm sunset tones.
